visual_description: A close-up shows a chicken's yellow legs standing on straw inside a coop with wire mesh. The scene cuts to a man in a brown suit and red tie standing outdoors near a fence, looking surprised as a chicken peers through the mesh. Then, an older man in a black cap and plaid shirt sits inside a vehicle, eating a piece of food.
audio_description: A man speaks with an animated tone outdoors, and the older man chews his food inside the vehicle.
